Container.Name: gramps-web-mcp
Container.Overview: MCP server for Gramps Web — structured AI agent access to your family tree over HTTP.
Container.Description:
Companion service for [Gramps Web](https://www.grampsweb.org/). Exposes the [Model Context Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/) over Streamable HTTP so MCP clients (Cursor, Claude Desktop, Open WebUI, and others) can search, read, and optionally modify your genealogy data.
**Prerequisites** - A running Gramps Web instance with API access - API username, password, and tree UUID
**Usage** - After install, point MCP clients at `http://[host]:[PORT:8080]/mcp`
Container.Requires: Internet access to pull the container image and reach your Gramps Web API URL.
Container.Changes:
### 2026-07-06 - Pin container image to 1.0.5 (auth recovery, typed media content, agent-friendly JSON input, quieter logging)
### 2026-06-28 - Pin container image to 1.0.4 (Gramps ID resolution, stdio logging fixes, ID cache)
### 2026-06-27 - Pin container image to 1.0.3
### 2026-06-24 - Pin container image to 1.0.1 - Add AGPL-3.0 license metadata - Point support link to Unraid forums thread
### 2026-06-14 - Initial Community Applications template

Config.Name: Gramps API URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Gramps Web instance (no trailing slash).

Config.Name: Gramps Password
Config.Description: Gramps Web API password or token.

Config.Name: Gramps Tree ID
Config.Description: Tree UUID on the Gramps Web server.

Config.Name: Read Only Mode
Config.Description: Set to true to block create, update, and delete tool calls while keeping tools visible.

Config.Name: Enable Media Resources
Config.Description: Enable binary media tools and resources for thumbnails and full files.

Config.Name: Media Max Bytes
Config.Description: Maximum bytes returned by any media resource.

Config.Name: Media Allowed MIME Types
Config.Description: Comma-separated MIME allowlist for media downloads.

Config.Name: Allow Private Media
Config.Description: Allow media bytes for Gramps records marked private.

Config.Name: MCP HTTP Port
Config.Description: Host port mapped to container port 8080 (MCP endpoint at /mcp).
